name: Tooltip
description: Describe or identify an element on hover.

documentation.purpose: Tooltips are used to describe or identify an element. In most scenarios, tooltips help the user understand meaning, function or alt-text. Tooltip will be displayed in Hover state.
guidance: Usually, the Tooltip appears above the object being prompted, and its position should not block the object being prompted and other important information.
When the Tooltip appears, it also needs to avoid being blocked.
Tooltip always appears at the top level.
The Tooltip will appear for the first time 1.5 seconds after the cursor hovers.
If the cursor points to the same type of object at this time, the Tooltip of the same type of object will appear immediately.
Within 30 seconds, if the user points the cursor to the last object where the Tooltip appeared again, the Tooltip will appear after 0.5 seconds.
documentation.iconButtonNote: By default, all Icon buttons have tooltips that will be displayed on Hover. If you don't need a Tooltip, turn the Show switch off under Tooltip in the Button option.

examples.label: Truncated text
examples.text: Tooltip will be displayed in Hover state.
